# DNA Rules — Distributed Package

This folder is managed by [NXD-Solutions/dna](https://github.com/NXD-Solutions/dna).

**Do not edit files here directly.** Changes made in this folder will be overwritten on the next distribution run. All changes must be made in `NXD-Solutions/dna` and distributed via the `Distribute Claude Config` workflow in `NXD-Solutions/.github`.
